subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Thou Who dost extend Thy mercy unto the thralls as they tread the path of purity and steadfastly uphold Thy sacred Law [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا من یرحم المملوک علی السلوک فی المنهج البیضاء و التشبث بالشریعه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for peace and unity, @war and peace, @relationship between government and people, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness
